parameters.name: options
parameters.desc: Optional tessellation controls: writeinterface (BOOLEAN), writesurfnormal (BOOLEAN, default #f), saveprecision (INTEGER), "aut-tolerance-control" (BOOLEAN, default #t), "vertex-precision" (INTEGER 8-16, default bndprecision), "faceter" ("v1"|"v2", default "v1"), "surface tolerance" (REAL, default 0), "normal tolerance" (REAL, default 15), "aspect ratio" (REAL, default 0), "max edge length" (REAL, default 0)

sdeio:save-tdr-bnd.description: Generates an output TDR boundary file, automatically calling the 2D or 3D variant depending on model dimensionality.

parameters.name: body-list
parameters.desc: List of bodies or "all" (BODY LIST | STRING). These are the first two required arguments in the call

parameters.name: file-name
parameters.desc: Output TDR boundary file name (STRING)

parameters.name: options
parameters.desc: Optional tessellation controls (keyword order is arbitrary after the first two required arguments): "aspect ratio" (REAL, default 0), "aut-tolerance-control" (BOOLEAN, default #t), "faceter" ("v1"|"v2", default "v1"), "max edge length" (REAL, default 0), "normal tolerance" (REAL, default 15), "surface tolerance" (REAL, default 0), "triangulate" (BOOLEAN, default #t; set #f for polyhedral models without internal holes), "vertex-precision" (INTEGER 8-16, default bndprecision), writeinterface (BOOLEAN), writesurfnormal (BOOLEAN, default #f)

sdepe:add-substrate.description: Adds an initial substrate layer to the device.

parameters.name: material
parameters.desc: DATEX material name for the generated substrate body

parameters.name: thickness
parameters.desc: Thickness of the substrate layer (REAL)

parameters.name: base
parameters.desc: Bottom z-coordinate of the substrate layer; if omitted, the substrate bottom is placed at z=0 (REAL, optional)

parameters.name: region-name
parameters.desc: Explicit region name assigned to the generated substrate (STRING, optional)

sdepe:clean.description: Cleans the model before a process emulation operation by regularizing all bodies and fixing imprints.

sdepe:define-pe-domain.description: Defines a base domain for process emulation as a rectangle or convex polygon in the xy plane.

parameters.name: X0 Y0 X1 Y1
parameters.desc: Four REAL numbers defining the xy coordinates of two opposite corners of a rectangular simulation domain

parameters.name: polygon
parameters.desc: REAL LIST of coordinate pairs defining the vertex points of a simply connected convex polygon for the simulation domain in the xy plane

sdepe:depo.description: Performs a deposition step with configurable type, algorithm, rounding, taper, and other options.

parameters.name: material
parameters.desc: DATEX material of the deposited layer

parameters.name: thickness
parameters.desc: Deposition thickness (REAL)

parameters.name: region-name
parameters.desc: Region name for the deposited layer (STRING, optional)

parameters.name: depo-type
parameters.desc: Deposition type: "iso" for isotropic or "aniso" for anisotropic (optional)

parameters.name: depo-alg
parameters.desc: Deposition algorithm: "lopx", "lop-move", "sweep", or "PT" (optional). Note: "lopx" cannot be used with anisotropic deposition; "PT" cannot be used with rounding

parameters.name: radius
parameters.desc: Rounding radius for the deposited layer (REAL, optional)

parameters.name: taper-angle
parameters.desc: Taper angle for directional deposition (REAL, optional)

parameters.name: taper-direction
parameters.desc: Taper direction as a list of "x", "-x", "y", "-y" (or any combination), optional

parameters.name: ray-vector
parameters.desc: GVECTOR specifying the directional deposition ray (optional)

parameters.name: BC
parameters.desc: Boundary condition: "none", "Reflect", "Periodic", or "ext-dist" (optional)

parameters.name: nsteps
parameters.desc: Number of deposition steps, must be >= 1 (INTEGER, optional)

sdepe:doping-constant-placement.description: Defines and applies a constant doping to a given region.

parameters.name: name
parameters.desc: Name of the constant doping profile (STRING)

parameters.name: species
parameters.desc: Dopant species name (STRING)

parameters.name: concentration
parameters.desc: Constant doping concentration value (REAL)

parameters.name: region-name
parameters.desc: Name of the region to which the constant doping is applied (STRING)

sdepe:etch-material.description: Performs an etching step on the specified material, using deposition arguments for geometry control.

parameters.name: material
parameters.desc: DATEX material to etch

parameters.name: depth
parameters.desc: Etch depth specifying the offset (REAL). Analogous to "thickness" in sdepe:depo

parameters.name: overetch
parameters.desc: Overetch offset to move vertical etch faces by the specified distance (REAL, optional)

parameters.name: ebl
parameters.desc: Etch body list: "all" (default, affects initially unexposed layers too) or "top" (only initially exposed bodies are affected), optional

sdepe:extend-masks.description: Extends all masks about a specified rectangular boundary by a given distance.

parameters.name: pminx
parameters.desc: Minimum x-coordinate of the rectangular boundary (REAL)

parameters.name: pminy
parameters.desc: Minimum y-coordinate of the rectangular boundary (REAL)

parameters.name: pmaxx
parameters.desc: Maximum x-coordinate of the rectangular boundary (REAL)

parameters.name: pmaxy
parameters.desc: Maximum y-coordinate of the rectangular boundary (REAL)

parameters.name: extension-distance
parameters.desc: Distance to extend all masks beyond the specified boundary (REAL)

sdepe:fill-device.description: Fills the device with the specified material up to the specified height.

parameters.name: material
parameters.desc: DATEX material used to fill the device

parameters.name: height
parameters.desc: Fill height (REAL, optional); if omitted, fills up to the top position of the device

parameters.name: region-name
parameters.desc: Region name for the filled region (STRING, optional)

sdepe:generate-domainboundary.description: Extracts the simulation boundary from an existing model and initializes the domainboundary variable.

sdepe:generate-empty-mask.description: Creates a new empty mask that behaves like a mask completely outside (light) or covering (dark) the domain.

parameters.name: maskname
parameters.desc: Name of the new empty mask (STRING). The name is registered and can be queried via get-empty-mask-list and exists-empty-mask-name

sdepe:generate-mask.description: Creates a mask from a polygon list for further process operations.

parameters.name: mask-name
parameters.desc: Name of the mask to create (STRING). A 'mask name' attribute is attached to the generated 2D sheet body

parameters.name: polygon-list
parameters.desc: POLYGON LIST specifying the vertex points of the mask. Each polygon is an xy coordinate list; rectangular polygons can use two opposite corners only. No intersecting edges or zero-length edges allowed (minimum 1.0e-06 between vertices)

sdepe:icon_layer.description: Creates interconnect structures with configurable mask, taper, materials, and regions.

parameters.name: mname
parameters.desc: Name of the mask (STRING); default is "". Must be specified together with "thickness"

parameters.name: mpolarity
parameters.desc: Mask polarity (STRING); default is "light"

parameters.name: lth
parameters.desc: Layer thickness (REAL); default is 0. Must be specified together with "mask"

parameters.name: tang
parameters.desc: Taper angle (REAL); default is 0

parameters.name: icmat
parameters.desc: Interconnect DATEX material (DATEXMAT); default is "Metal"

parameters.name: envmat
parameters.desc: DATEX material used for the fill (DATEXMAT); default is "Gas"

parameters.name: icr
parameters.desc: Interconnect region name (STRING); default is "ic-region"

parameters.name: envr
parameters.desc: Region name of the filled part (STRING); default is "env-region"

parameters.name: bc
parameters.desc: Base coordinate of the created layer in z-direction (REAL); default is the previous maximal z-coordinate

parameters.name: tpos
parameters.desc: Taper position: "top" (extrude first then taper sidewalls from top) or "bottom" (taper from bottom); default is "bottom"

sdepe:implant.description: Applies a predefined doping profile to the top surface of a device, with optional flat projection and material masking.

parameters.name: doping-name
parameters.desc: Name of a previously defined doping profile via sdedr:define-constant-profile, sdedr:define-1d-external-profile, sdedr:define-erf-profile, sdedr:define-gaussian-profile, or sdedr:define-analytical-profile (STRING)

parameters.name: abs-height
parameters.desc: Absolute (fixed) z-coordinate value for the flat projection baseline (REAL, optional). Mutually exclusive with delta-height

parameters.name: delta-height
parameters.desc: Offset from the maximum z-coordinate for the flat projection baseline (REAL, optional). Mutually exclusive with abs-height

parameters.name: pmatlist
parameters.desc: DATEXMAT or DATEXMAT LIST specifying additional materials that behave like resist, protecting the top exposed surface from doping implantation (optional)

parameters.name: direction
parameters.desc: Direction of the profile with respect to the baseline: "Positive", "Negative", or "Both" (STRING, optional); default is "Both"

sdepe:pattern.signature: (sdepe:pattern "mask" mask-name "polarity" polarity ["type" depo-type] "material" material ["algorithm" depo-alg] "thickness" thickness ["steps" nsteps] ["region" region])
sdepe:pattern.description: Performs a pattern step by depositing material through a defined mask.

parameters.name: mask-name
parameters.desc: Name of an existing mask (STRING). The mask must be already defined

parameters.name: polarity
parameters.desc: Mask polarity: "light" or "dark"

parameters.name: depo-type
parameters.desc: Deposition type: "iso" or "aniso" (optional). For details, see sdepe:depo

parameters.name: material
parameters.desc: DATEX material for the patterned layer

parameters.name: depo-alg
parameters.desc: Deposition algorithm: "lopx", "lop-move", "sweep", or "PT" (optional)

parameters.name: thickness
parameters.desc: Pattern layer thickness (REAL)

parameters.name: nsteps
parameters.desc: Number of deposition steps (INTEGER >= 1, optional)

parameters.name: region
parameters.desc: Region name of the patterned body (STRING, optional)

sdepe:photo.signature: (sdepe:photo "mask" mask-name "polarity" polarity ["type" depo-type] "material" material {"thickness" thickness | "height" height} ["steps" nsteps] ["region" region])
sdepe:photo.description: Performs a photo (flat pattern) step combining fill, pattern, and etch to create a flat top surface.

parameters.name: mask-name
parameters.desc: Name of an existing mask (STRING). The mask must be already defined

parameters.name: polarity
parameters.desc: Mask polarity: "light" or "dark"

parameters.name: depo-type
parameters.desc: Deposition type: "aniso" or "iso" (optional). Algorithms are selected automatically for robustness

parameters.name: material
parameters.desc: DATEX material for the photo layer

parameters.name: thickness
parameters.desc: Layer thickness (REAL). Either "thickness" or "height" must be specified

parameters.name: height
parameters.desc: Absolute height for the photo layer (REAL). Either "thickness" or "height" must be specified

parameters.name: nsteps
parameters.desc: Number of steps (INTEGER >= 1, optional)

parameters.name: region
parameters.desc: Region name for the patterned body (STRING, optional)

sdepe:polish-device.description: Removes the top part of the device by a specified thickness or above a specified height.

parameters.name: thickness
parameters.desc: Distance measured from the top device position; all materials from the top are removed (REAL, optional). Mutually exclusive with height

parameters.name: height
parameters.desc: Absolute height; all material above this height is removed (REAL, optional). Mutually exclusive with thickness

parameters.name: material
parameters.desc: DATEX material (optional); if specified, only the top exposed bodies with this material attribute are polished (selective polish)

sdepe:remove.description: Removes the specified region or material from the device.

parameters.name: region-name
parameters.desc: Name of the region to remove (STRING, optional). Use with the "region" keyword

parameters.name: material
parameters.desc: DATEX material to remove (DATEXMAT, optional). Use with the "material" keyword

sdepe:trim-masks.description: Trims all masks so they do not extend outside the domain boundary.

parameters.name: domainboundary
parameters.desc: Wire body representing the domain boundary (WIRE BODY). This is the global variable domainboundary set by sdepe:define-pe-domain or automatically extracted from an existing model

sdesnmesh:axisaligned.description: Sets the global variables used inside the AxisAligned section of the Sentaurus Mesh command file.

parameters.name: xCuts
parameters.desc: List of REAL values specifying X-direction cut positions for axis-aligned mesh refinement

parameters.name: yCuts
parameters.desc: List of REAL values specifying Y-direction cut positions for axis-aligned mesh refinement

parameters.name: zCuts
parameters.desc: List of REAL values specifying Z-direction cut positions for axis-aligned mesh refinement

parameters.name: spacingMethod
parameters.desc: Spacing method for the axis-aligned mesh; one of "even", "none", "regular", or "smooth"

parameters.name: maxAspectRatio
parameters.desc: Maximum allowed aspect ratio of mesh elements

parameters.name: maxAngle
parameters.desc: Maximum allowed angle (in degrees) of mesh elements

parameters.name: minEdgeLength
parameters.desc: Minimum allowed edge length of mesh elements

parameters.name: geometricAccuracy
parameters.desc: Geometric accuracy for interface fitting

parameters.name: latticeCellSize
parameters.desc: Lattice cell size as a list of REAL values: 2 numbers for 2D structures, 3 numbers for 3D structures

parameters.name: latticeDimensions
parameters.desc: Lattice dimensions as a list of REAL values: 2 numbers for 2D structures, 3 numbers for 3D structures

sdesnmesh:delaunizer.description: Sets the global variables used inside the Delaunizer section of the mesh command file.

parameters.name: type
parameters.desc: Delaunizer algorithm type; one of "boxmethod", "conforming", or "constrained"

parameters.name: maxPoints
parameters.desc: Maximum number of points for the delaunizer algorithm

parameters.name: maxConnectivity
parameters.desc: Maximum allowed connectivity of mesh elements

parameters.name: maxNeighborRatio
parameters.desc: Maximum allowed neighbor ratio of mesh elements

parameters.name: maxAngle
parameters.desc: Maximum allowed angle (in degrees) of Delaunay triangulation elements

parameters.name: minAngle
parameters.desc: Minimum allowed angle (in degrees) of Delaunay triangulation elements

parameters.name: minEdgeLength
parameters.desc: Minimum allowed edge length of Delaunay triangulation elements

parameters.name: delaunayTolerance
parameters.desc: Tolerance value for the Delaunay triangulation algorithm

sdesnmesh:delaunizer-tolerance.description: Sets the tolerance parameters for the delaunizer in the Sentaurus Mesh command file.

parameters.name: tolerance
parameters.desc: REAL value specifying the delaunizer tolerance

parameters.name: location-type
parameters.desc: Location specification: "region" ["region1" ["region2"]] | "material" ["material1" ["material2"]] | "global"; combined with a location qualifier ("boundary", "interior", or "surface")

parameters.name: window
parameters.desc: Window definition for spatial restriction: "window" x0 y0 z0 x1 y1 z1, specifying two diagonal corners of an axis-aligned bounding box

sdesnmesh:interpolate.description: Sets the parameters used in the Interpolate section of the mesh command file.

parameters.name: interpolateElements
parameters.desc: Enable element interpolation during mesh refinement (default is #f)

parameters.name: keepTotalConcentration
parameters.desc: Keep total concentration unchanged during interpolation (default is #f)

parameters.name: lateralDiffusion
parameters.desc: Enable lateral diffusion during interpolation (default is #f)

sdesnmesh:iocontrols.description: Sets the parameters used in the IOControls section of the mesh command file.

parameters.name: inputFile
parameters.desc: Path to the input mesh file (optional)

parameters.name: outputFile
parameters.desc: Path to the output mesh file (optional)

parameters.name: verbosity
parameters.desc: INTEGER controlling the verbosity level of mesh output messages

parameters.name: numThreads
parameters.desc: INTEGER specifying the number of threads for parallel meshing

parameters.name: useDFISEcoordinates
parameters.desc: Use DF-ISE coordinate system (default is #f)

parameters.name: useUCScoordinates
parameters.desc: Use UCS (Universal Coordinate System) coordinates (default is #t)

sdesnmesh:qualityreport.description: Sets the parameters of the QualityReport section of the Sentaurus Mesh command file.

parameters.name: qrtype
parameters.desc: Quality report block type: "Global" for a global block, "Material" for a material-specific block, or "Region" for a region-specific block

parameters.name: qrelements
parameters.desc: List of DATEX material names (when qrtype is "Material") or region names (when qrtype is "Region"); not used when qrtype is "Global"

parameters.name: limitMaxConnectivity
parameters.desc: INTEGER specifying the maximum allowed connectivity limit for mesh quality checking

parameters.name: limitMaxNonDelaunay
parameters.desc: REAL specifying the maximum allowed non-Delaunay elements limit

parameters.name: limitMinAngle
parameters.desc: REAL specifying the minimum allowed angle limit (in degrees) for mesh elements

parameters.name: limitMinEdgeLength
parameters.desc: REAL specifying the minimum allowed edge length limit for mesh elements

parameters.name: limitMinVolume
parameters.desc: REAL specifying the minimum allowed volume limit for mesh elements

sdesnmesh:tensor.description: Replaces the Tensor section of the mesh command file with the given string without syntax-checking.

parameters.name: value
parameters.desc: Raw STRING content to replace the Tensor section; double quotation marks within the string must be escaped with backslash

sdesnmesh:tools.description: Replaces the Tools section of the mesh command file with the given string without syntax-checking.

parameters.name: value
parameters.desc: Raw STRING content to replace the Tools section; double quotation marks within the string must be escaped with backslash

sdesp:begin.description: Begins Sentaurus Process and Sentaurus Structure Editor boundary-merging mode (3D only).

sdesp:define-step.description: Loads a .sat file and merges it with the current geometry, associating a step name for reproduction in Sentaurus Process.

parameters.name: step-name
parameters.desc: STRING name associated with the current structure step to be reproduced in Sentaurus Process

parameters.name: file-name
parameters.desc: STRING path to the .sat file to load and merge with the currently loaded geometry

sdesp:finalize.description: Completes boundary merging and writes a Sentaurus Process Tcl file with the recreate_step procedure.

parameters.name: Tcl-file-name
parameters.desc: STRING path of the output Tcl file that defines the recreate_step procedure for Sentaurus Process

sdesp:restore-state.description: Restores the internal state of Sentaurus Process and SDE boundary-merging to permit restarting from a saved point.

parameters.name: step-name-list
parameters.desc: STRING LIST of all step names in the correct order to restore the boundary-merging sequence
